prompt: A surreal but physically plausible scene of a crowded social gathering. In the center stands a single person who appears relatively isolated, while everyone around them is surrounded by many others, forming dense overlapping circles of interaction. The surrounding people are each connected to multiple groups, while the central figure has noticeably fewer connections. The composition subtly emphasizes that most people are more socially connected than the central individual. Natural lighting, realistic human figures, no text, no symbols, no diagrams.
visual_logic: A central individual appears less connected while others are surrounded by many, reflecting that most people's friends are more connected than they are.
